= { not_started: 0, introduced: 10, practicing: 25, confident: 50, mastered: 100 };\nconst clamp = (n: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));\n\nconst getUserId = () => {\n  let userId = localStorage.getItem('tp_tutor_user_id');\n  if (!userId) {\n    userId = crypto.randomUUID();\n    localStorage.setItem('tp_tutor_user_id', userId);\n  }\n  return userId;\n};\n\nexport const useMasteryStore = create<MasteryStore>()(\n  persist(\n    (set, get) => ({\n      studentName: 'Anthony',\n      profileImage: '',\n      lastUpdated: '',\n      vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n      concepts: initialConcepts,\n      curriculums,\n      activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n (delta) =>\n                delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? 0) + d.delta, 0, 100);\n            return {\n              ...w,\n              confidenceScore: newScore,\n              status: scoreToStatus(newScore),\n              useCount: (w.useCount ?? 0) + 1,\n            };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            if (w.id !== wordIdOrText && w.word.toLowerCase() !== wordIdOrText.toLowerCase()) return w;\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[status];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateConceptStatus: (id, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          concepts: state.concepts.map((c) =>\n            c.id === id ? { ...c, status } : c\n          ),\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      savePhrase: (phrase) => {\n        set((state) => {\n          const key = typeof phrase === 'string' ? phrase : phrase.tp;\n          const already = state.savedPhrases.some(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: today });\n          }\n        }\n      },\n\n      setStudentName: (name) => { set({ studentName: name }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n      setProfileImage: (url) => { set({ profileImage: url }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n\n      updatePhraseNote: (id, notes) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.map(p => {\n            if (typeof p === 'string') },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      resetAsNewUser: () => {\n        set({\n          studentName: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      randomizeVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => {\n            const score = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { ...summary, level, rankTitle };\n      },\n\n      setActiveLesson: (curriculumId, moduleId) =>\n        set({ activeCurriculumId: curriculumId, activeModuleId: moduleId }),\n\n      syncToCloud: async () => {\n        const { vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage, savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate } = get();\n savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate,\n          });\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n      syncFromCloud: () => {\n v.sessionNotes,\n  };\n}\n\nconst INITIAL_VOCABULARY: VocabWord[] = initialVocabulary.map(toFullVocabWord);\n\ninterface Concept {\n  id: string;\n  title: string;\n  status: MasteryStatus;\n  sessionNotes: string;\n}\n\ninterface MasteryActions {\n  applyScoreDeltas: (deltas: { wordId: string; delta: number }[]) => void;\n  updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText: string, status: MasteryStatus) => void;\n  updateConceptStatus: (id: string, status: MasteryStatus) => void;\n  setLastUpdated: (date: string) => void;\n  savePhrase: (phrase: string | SavedPhrase) => void;\n  recordActivity: () => void;\n  setStudentName: (name: string) => void;\n  setProfileImage: (url: string) => void;\n  updatePhraseNote: (id: string, notes: string) => void;\n  deletePhrase: (id: string) => void;\n  resetAsNewUser: () => void;\n  randomizeVocab: () => void;\n  masterAllVocab: () => void;\n  syncFromCloud: () => Unsubscribe | void;\n  syncToCloud: () => Promise<void>;\n  getStatusSummary: () => StatusSummary & { xp: number; level: number; rankTitle: string };\n  setActiveLesson: (curriculumId: string, moduleId: string) => void;\n}\n\ninterface MasteryState {\n  studentName: string;\n  profileImage: string;\n  lastUpdated: string;\n  vocabulary: VocabWord[];\n  concepts: Concept[];\n  curriculums: typeof curriculums;\n  activeCurriculumId: string | null;\n  activeModuleId: string | null;\n  savedPhrases: (string | SavedPhrase)[];\n  currentStreak: number;\n  lastActiveDate: string;\n}\n\ntype MasteryStore = MasteryState & MasteryActions;\n\nconst XP_MAP = { not_started: 0, introduced: 10, practicing: 25, confident: 50, mastered: 100 };\nconst clamp = (n: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));\n\nconst getUserId = () => {\n  let userId = localStorage.getItem('tp_tutor_user_id');\n  if (!userId) {\n    userId = crypto.randomUUID();\n    localStorage.setItem('tp_tutor_user_id', userId);\n  }\n  return userId;\n};\n\nexport const useMasteryStore = create<MasteryStore>()(\n  persist(\n    (set, get) => ({\n      studentName: 'Anthony',\n      profileImage: '',\n      lastUpdated: '',\n      vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n      concepts: initialConcepts,\n      curriculums,\n      activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n      applyScoreDeltas: (deltas) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            const d = deltas.find(\n              (delta) =>\n                delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? 0) + d.delta, 0, 100);\n            return {\n              ...w,\n              confidenceScore: newScore,\n              status: scoreToStatus(newScore),\n              useCount: (w.useCount ?? 0) + 1,\n            };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            if (w.id !== wordIdOrText && w.word.toLowerCase() !== wordIdOrText.toLowerCase()) return w;\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[status];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateConceptStatus: (id, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          concepts: state.concepts.map((c) =>\n            c.id === id ? { ...c, status } : c\n          ),\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      savePhrase: (phrase) => {\n        set((state) => {\n          const key = typeof phrase === 'string' ? phrase : phrase.tp;\n          const already = state.savedPhrases.some(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: today });\n          }\n        }\n      },\n\n      setStudentName: (name) => { set({ studentName: name }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n      setProfileImage: (url) => { set({ profileImage: url }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n\n      updatePhraseNote: (id, notes) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.map(p => {\n            if (typeof p === 'string') return p === id ? { id, tp: p, en: 'User Saved Phrase *', notes } : p;\n            return p.id === id ? { ...p, notes } : p;\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      resetAsNewUser: () => {\n        set({\n          studentName: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      randomizeVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => {\n            const score = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      masterAllVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => ({ ...w, confidenceScore: 92, status: 'mastered' as MasteryStatus }))\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { ...summary, level, rankTitle };\n      },\n\n      setActiveLesson: (curriculumId, moduleId) =>\n        set({ activeCurriculumId: curriculumId, activeModuleId: moduleId }),\n\n      syncToCloud: async () => {\n        const { vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage, savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate } = get();\n savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate,\n          });\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n      syncFromCloud: () => {\n        const userId = getUserId();\n        return onSnapshot(doc(db, 'users', userId), (snapshot) => {\n          if (!snapshot.exists()) return;\n          const data = snapshot.data();\n\n          const vocabulary = (data.vocabulary || INITIAL_VOCABULARY).map(\n            (w: any) => {\n              const useCount = typeof w.useCount === 'number' ? w.useCount : 0;\n              if (typeof w.confidenceScore === 'number') return { ...w, useCount };\n              const status: MasteryStatus = w.status || 'not_started';\n              return { ...w, confidenceScore: STATUS_MIDPOINT[status], useCount };\n            }\n          );\n\n          set({\n            vocabulary,\n            concepts: data.concepts || initialConcepts,\n            lastUpdated: activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n      applyScoreDeltas: (deltas) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            const d = deltas.find(\n              (delta) =>\n                delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? 0) + d.delta, 0, 100);\n            return {\n              ...w,\n p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: today });\n          }\n        }\n      },\n\n      setStudentName: (name) },\n\n      randomizeVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => {\n            const score = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      masterAllVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => ({ ...w, confidenceScore: 92, status: 'mastered' as MasteryStatus }))\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { ...summary, level, rankTitle };\n      },\n\n      setActiveLesson: (curriculumId, moduleId) =>\n        set({ activeCurriculumId: curriculumId, activeModuleId: moduleId }),\n\n      syncToCloud: async () => {\n (err) {\n          console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n      syncFromCloud: () => {\n        const userId = getUserId();\n        return onSnapshot(doc(db, 'users', userId), (snapshot) => {\n          if (!snapshot.exists()) return;\n          const data = snapshot.data();\n\n          const vocabulary = (data.vocabulary || INITIAL_VOCABULARY).map(\n            (w: any) => {\n              const base = INITIAL_VOCABULARY.find(iv => iv.word === w.word);\n              const useCount = typeof w.useCount === 'number' ? w.useCount : 0;\n              const frequencyRank = typeof w.frequencyRank === 'number' ? w.frequencyRank : (base?.frequencyRank ?? 999);\n              \n              if (typeof w.confidenceScore === 'number') return { ...w, useCount, frequencyRank };\n              const status: MasteryStatus = w.status || 'not_started';\n              return { ...w, confidenceScore: STATUS_MIDPOINT[status], useCount, frequencyRank };\n            }\n          );\n\n          set({\n            vocabulary,\n            concepts: data.concepts || initialConcepts,\n            lastUpdated: data.lastUpdated || '',\n            studentName: data.studentName || 'Anthony',\n            profileImage: data.profileImage || '',\n            savedPhrases: data.savedPhrases || [],\n            currentStreak: data.currentStreak || 0,\n to Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Error checking for migration:', err);\n        }\n\n curriculums,\n      activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n      applyScoreDeltas: (deltas) => {\n savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate,\n          }, { merge: true });\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n to Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Error checking for migration:', err);\n        }\n\n p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: today });\n          }\n        }\n      },\n\n      setStudentName: (name) string) => void;\n}\n\ninterface MasteryState {\n  userId: string | null;\n  studentName: string;\n  profileImage: string;\n  lastUpdated: string;\n  vocabulary: VocabWord[];\n  concepts: Concept[];\n  curriculums: typeof curriculums;\n  activeCurriculumId: string | null;\n  activeModuleId: string | null;\n  savedPhrases: (string | SavedPhrase)[];\n  currentStreak: number;\n  lastActiveDate: string;\n}\n\ntype MasteryStore = MasteryState & MasteryActions;\n\nconst XP_MAP = { not_started: 0, introduced: 10, practicing: 25, confident: 50, mastered: 100 };\nconst clamp = (n: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));\n\nexport const useMasteryStore = create<MasteryStore>()(\n  persist(\n    (set, get) => ({\n      userId: null,\n      studentName: 'Anthony',\n      profileImage: '',\n      lastUpdated: '',\n      vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n      concepts: initialConcepts,\n      curriculums,\n      activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n      applyScoreDeltas: (deltas) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            const d = deltas.find(\n              (delta) =>\n                delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? 0) + d.delta, 0, 100);\n            return {\n              ...w,\n              confidenceScore: newScore,\n              status: scoreToStatus(newScore),\n              useCount: (w.useCount ?? 0) + 1,\n            };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            if (w.id !== wordIdOrText && w.word.toLowerCase() !== wordIdOrText.toLowerCase()) return w;\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[status];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateConceptStatus: (id, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          concepts: state.concepts.map((c) =>\n            c.id === id ? { ...c, status } : c\n          ),\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      savePhrase: (phrase) => {\n        set((state) => {\n          const key = typeof phrase === 'string' ? phrase : phrase.tp;\n          const already = state.savedPhrases.some(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: today });\n          }\n        }\n      },\n\n      setStudentName: (name) => { set({ studentName: name }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n      setProfileImage: (url) => { set({ profileImage: url }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n\n      updatePhraseNote: (id, notes) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.map(p => {\n            if (typeof p === 'string') return p === id ? { id, tp: p, en: 'User Saved Phrase *', notes } : p;\n            return p.id === id ? { ...p, notes } : p;\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      resetAsNewUser: () => {\n        set({\n          studentName: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      randomizeVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => {\n            const score = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      masterAllVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => ({ ...w, confidenceScore: 92, status: 'mastered' as MasteryStatus }))\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      clearLocalData: () => {\n        set({\n          userId: null,\n          studentName: 'Anthony',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { ...summary, level, rankTitle };\n      },\n\n      setActiveLesson: (curriculumId, moduleId) =>\n        set({ activeCurriculumId: curriculumId, activeModuleId: moduleId }),\n\n      syncToCloud: async (explicitUserId) => {\n        const { vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage, savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate, userId } = get();\n        const targetId = explicitUserId || userId;\n        if (!targetId) return;\n\n        try {\n          await setDoc(doc(db, 'users', targetId), {\n            vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage,\n            savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate,\n          }, { merge: true });\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n      syncFromCloud: async (uid: string, initialName?: string) => {\n        set({ userId: uid });\n        const userDocRef = doc(db, 'users', uid);\n        \n        try {\n          const docSnap = await getDoc(userDocRef);\n          \n          if (!docSnap.exists()) {\n            // New user or no cloud data\n            if (initialName && (get().studentName === 'Anthony' || !get().studentName)) {\n              set({ studentName: initialName });\n            }\n\n            const { vocabulary } = get();\n            const isFresh = vocabulary.every(w => w.status === 'not_started');\n            if (!isFresh) {\n              console.log('Migrating local progress to Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Error checking for migration:', err);\n        }\n\n        return onSnapshot(userDocRef, (snapshot) => {\n          if (!snapshot.exists()) return;\n          const data = snapshot.data();\n\n          const vocabulary = (data.vocabulary || INITIAL_VOCABULARY).map(\n            (w: any) => {\n              const base = INITIAL_VOCABULARY.find(iv => iv.word === w.word);\n              const useCount = typeof w.useCount === 'number' ? w.useCount : 0;\n              const frequencyRank = typeof w.frequencyRank === 'number' ? w.frequencyRank : (base?.frequencyRank ?? 999);\n              \n              if (typeof w.confidenceScore === 'number') return { ...w, useCount, frequencyRank };\n              const status: MasteryStatus = w.status || 'not_started';\n              return { ...w, confidenceScore: STATUS_MIDPOINT[status], useCount, frequencyRank };\n            }\n          );\n\n          set({\n            vocabulary,\n            concepts: data.concepts || initialConcepts,\n            lastUpdated: data.lastUpdated || '',\n            studentName: data.studentName || 'Anthony',\n            profileImage: data.profileImage || '',\n            savedPhrases: data.savedPhrases || [],\n            currentStreak: data.currentStreak || 0,\n            lastActiveDate: data.lastActiveDate || '',\n          });\n        });\n      },\n    }),\n    { \n      name: 'tp-tutor-mastery',\n      partialize: (state) => {\n        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n        const { userId, ...rest } = )\n);\n","diffStat":{"model_added_lines":6,"model_removed_lines":3,"model_added_chars":257,"model_removed_chars":170,"user_added_lines":0,"user_removed_lines":0,"user_added_chars":0,"user_removed_chars":0},"isNewFile":false},"description":"src/store/masteryStore.ts: (phrase: string | SavedPhrase) => void;\n  recordActivity: () => void;\n  setStudentName: (name: string) => void;\n  setProfileImage: (url: string) => void;\n  updatePhraseNote: (id: string, notes: string) => void;\n  deletePhrase: (id: string) => void;\n  resetAsNewUser: () => void;\n  randomizeVocab: () => void;\n  masterAllVocab: () => void;\n  clearLocalData: () => void;\n  syncFromCloud: (userId: string, initialName?: string, initialProfileImage?: string) => Promise<Unsubscribe | void>;\n  syncToCloud: (userId?: string) => Promise<void>;\n  getStatusSummary: () => StatusSummary & { xp: number; level: number; rankTitle: string };\n  setActiveLesson: (curriculumId: string, moduleId: string) => void;\n}\n\ninterface MasteryState {\n  userId: string | null;\n  studentName: string;\n  profileImage: string;\n  lastUpdated: string;\n  vocabulary: VocabWord[];\n  concepts: Concept[];\n  curriculums: typeof curriculums;\n  activeCurriculumId: string | null;\n  activeModuleId: string | null;\n  savedPhrases: (string | SavedPhrase)[];\n  currentStreak: number;\n  lastActiveDate: string;\n}\n\ntype MasteryStore = MasteryState & MasteryActions;\n\nconst XP_MAP = { not_started: 0, introduced: 10, practicing: 25, confident: 50, mastered: 100 };\nconst clamp = (n: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));\n\nexport const useMasteryStore =     concepts: initialConcepts,\n      curriculums,\n      activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? 0) + d.delta, 0, 100);\n            return {\n              ...w,\n              confidenceScore: newScore,\n              status: scoreToStatus(newScore),\n              useCount: (w.useCount ?? 0) + 1,\n            };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            if (w.id !== wordIdOrText && w.word.toLowerCase() !== wordIdOrText.toLowerCase()) return w;\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[status];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateConceptStatus: (id, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          concepts: state.concepts.map((c) =>\n            c.id === id ? { ...c, status } : c\n          ),\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      savePhrase: (phrase) => {\n        set((state) => {\n          const key = typeof phrase === 'string' ? phrase : phrase.tp;\n          const already = state.savedPhrases.some(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      resetAsNewUser: () => {\n        set({\n          studentName: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      clearLocalData: () => {\n        set({\n          userId: null,\n          studentName: 'Anthony',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n null,\n        });\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if ?? 999,\n    isMasteryCandidate: false,\n    sessionNotes: v.sessionNotes,\n  };\n}\n\nconst INITIAL_VOCABULARY: VocabWord[] = initialVocabulary.map(toFullVocabWord);\n\ninterface Concept {\n  id: introduced: 10, practicing: 25, confident: 50, mastered: 100 };\nconst clamp = (n: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));\n\nexport const useMasteryStore =     concepts: initialConcepts,\n      curriculums,\n      activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n      applyScoreDeltas: (deltas) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            const d = deltas.find(\n              (delta) =>\n                delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[status];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      resetAsNewUser: () => {\n        set({\n          studentName: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n null,\n        });\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { ...summary, level, rankTitle };\n      },\n\n      setActiveLesson: (curriculumId, moduleId) =>\n        set({ activeCurriculumId: curriculumId, activeModuleId: moduleId }),\n\n      syncToCloud: async (explicitUserId) => {\n        const { vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage, savedPhrases, currentStreak, console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n      syncFromCloud: async (uid: string, initialName?: string, initialProfileImage?: string) => {\n        set({ userId: uid });\n (initialProfileImage && !get().profileImage) {\n              set({ profileImage: initialProfileImage });\n            }\n\n            const { vocabulary } = get();\n            const isFresh = vocabulary.every(w => w.status === 'not_started');\n            if (!isFresh) {\n              console.log('Migrating local progress to Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Error checking for migration:', err);\n        }\n\n delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateConceptStatus: (id, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          concepts: state.concepts.map((c) =>\n            c.id === id ? { ...c, status } : phrase.tp;\n          const already = state.savedPhrases.some(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: today });\n          }\n        }\n      },\n\n      setStudentName: (name) => { set({ studentName: name }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n      setProfileImage: (url) => { set({ profileImage: url }); },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      resetAsNewUser: () => {\n        set({\n          studentName: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n null,\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      randomizeVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => {\n            const score = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      masterAllVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => ({ ...w, confidenceScore: 92, status: 'mastered' as MasteryStatus }))\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      clearLocalData: () => {\n        set({\n          userId: null,\n          studentName: 'Anthony',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { ...summary, level, rankTitle };\n      },\n\n      setActiveLesson: (curriculumId, moduleId) =>\n        set({ activeCurriculumId: curriculumId, activeModuleId: moduleId }),\n\n      syncToCloud: async (explicitUserId) => {\n        const { vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage, savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate, userId } = get();\n        const targetId = explicitUserId || userId;\n        if (!targetId) return;\n\n        try {\n          await setDoc(doc(db, 'users', targetId), {\n            vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage,\n            savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate,\n          }, { merge: true });\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n      syncFromCloud: async (uid: string, initialName?: string, initialProfileImage?: string) => {\n        set({ userId: uid });\n        const userDocRef = doc(db, 'users', uid);\n        \n        try {\n          const docSnap = await getDoc(userDocRef);\n          \n          if (!docSnap.exists()) {\n            // New user or no cloud data\n            if (initialName && (get().studentName === 'Anthony' || !get().studentName)) {\n              set({ studentName: initialName });\n            }\n            if (initialProfileImage && !get().profileImage) {\n              set({ profileImage: initialProfileImage });\n            }\n\n            const { vocabulary } = get();\n            const isFresh = vocabulary.every(w => w.status === 'not_started');\n            if (!isFresh) {\n              console.log('Migrating local progress to Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Error checking for migration:', err);\n        }\n\n        return onSnapshot(userDocRef, (snapshot) => {\n          if (!snapshot.exists()) return;\n          const data = snapshot.data();\n\n          const vocabulary = (data.vocabulary || INITIAL_VOCABULARY).map(\n            (w: any) => {\n              const base = INITIAL_VOCABULARY.find(iv => iv.word === w.word);\n              const useCount = typeof w.useCount === 'number' ? w.useCount : 0;\n              const frequencyRank = typeof w.frequencyRank === 'number' ? w.frequencyRank : (base?.frequencyRank ?? 999);\n              \n              if (typeof w.confidenceScore === 'number') return { ...w, useCount, frequencyRank };\n              const status: MasteryStatus = w.status || 'not_started';\n              return { ...w, confidenceScore: STATUS_MIDPOINT[status], useCount, frequencyRank };\n            }\n          );\n\n          set({\n            vocabulary,\n            concepts: data.concepts || initialConcepts,\n            lastUpdated: data.lastUpdated || '',\n            studentName: data.studentName || 'Anthony',\n            profileImage: data.profileImage || '',\n            savedPhrases: data.savedPhrases || [],\n            currentStreak: data.currentStreak || 0,\n            lastActiveDate: data.lastActiveDate || '',\n          });\n        });\n      },\n    }),\n    { \n      name: 'tp-tutor-mastery',\n      partialize: (state) => {\n        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n        const { userId, ...rest } = state;\n        return rest;\n      }\n    }\n  )\n);\n","newContent":"/* src/store/masteryStore.ts */\nimport { db } from '../services/firebase';\nimport { create } from 'zustand';\nimport { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';\nimport { doc, setDoc, onSnapshot, getDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';\nimport type { Unsubscribe } from 'firebase/firestore';\nimport type { MasteryStatus, VocabWord, StatusSummary, SavedPhrase } from '../types/mastery';\nimport { scoreToStatus, STATUS_MIDPOINT } from '../types/mastery';\nimport { initialVocabulary, initialConcepts, curriculums } from '../data/initialMasteryMap';\n\n// Map the simplified initialVocabulary entries to the full VocabWord shape\n// so all existing components keep working without changes.\nfunction toFullVocabWord(v: { word: string; status: MasteryStatus; sessionNotes: string; frequencyRank?: number }): VocabWord {\n  return {\n    id: v.word,\n    word: v.word,\n    partOfSpeech: '',\n    meanings: '',\n    confidenceScore: STATUS_MIDPOINT[v.status],\n    status: v.status,\n    useCount: 0,\n    frequencyRank: v.frequencyRank ?? 999,\n    isMasteryCandidate: false,\n    sessionNotes: v.sessionNotes,\n  };\n}\n\nconst INITIAL_VOCABULARY: VocabWord[] = initialVocabulary.map(toFullVocabWord);\n\ninterface Concept {\n  id: string;\n  title: string;\n  status: MasteryStatus;\n  sessionNotes: string;\n}\n\ninterface MasteryActions {\n  applyScoreDeltas: (deltas: { wordId: string; delta: number }[]) => void;\n  updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText: string, status: MasteryStatus) => void;\n  cycleWordStatus: (wordId: string) => void;\n  updateConceptStatus: (id: string, status: MasteryStatus) => void;\n  setLastUpdated: (date: string) => void;\n  savePhrase: (phrase: string | SavedPhrase) => void;\n  recordActivity: () => void;\n  setStudentName: (name: string) => void;\n  setBio: (bio: string) => void;\n  setProfileImage: (url: string) => void;\n  updatePhraseNote: (id: string, notes: string) => void;\n  deletePhrase: (id: string) => void;\n  resetAsNewUser: () => void;\n  randomizeVocab: () => void;\n  masterAllVocab: () => void;\n  clearLocalData: () => void;\n  syncFromCloud: (userId: string, initialName?: string, initialProfileImage?: string) => Promise<Unsubscribe | void>;\n  syncToCloud: (userId?: string) => Promise<void>;\n  getStatusSummary: () => StatusSummary & { xp: number; level: number; rankTitle: string };\n  setActiveLesson: (curriculumId: string, moduleId: string) => void;\n}\n\ninterface MasteryState {\n  userId: string | null;\n  studentName: string;\n  bio: string;\n  profileImage: string;\n  lastUpdated: string;\n  vocabulary: VocabWord[];\n  concepts: Concept[];\n  curriculums: typeof curriculums;\n  activeCurriculumId: string | null;\n  activeModuleId: string | null;\n  savedPhrases: (string | SavedPhrase)[];\n  currentStreak: number;\n  lastActiveDate: string;\n}\n\ntype MasteryStore = MasteryState & MasteryActions;\n\nconst XP_MAP = { not_started: 0, introduced: 10, practicing: 25, confident: 50, mastered: 100 };\nconst STATUS_ORDER: MasteryStatus[] = ['not_started', 'introduced', 'practicing', 'confident', 'mastered'];\nconst clamp = (n: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));\n\nexport const useMasteryStore = create<MasteryStore>()(\n  persist(\n    (set, get) => ({\n      userId: null,\n      studentName: 'Anthony',\n      bio: '',\n      profileImage: '',\n      lastUpdated: '',\n      vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n      concepts: initialConcepts,\n      curriculums,\n      activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n      applyScoreDeltas: (deltas) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            const d = deltas.find(\n              (delta) =>\n                delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? 0) + d.delta, 0, 100);\n            return {\n              ...w,\n              confidenceScore: newScore,\n              status: scoreToStatus(newScore),\n              useCount: (w.useCount ?? 0) + 1,\n            };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            if (w.id !== wordIdOrText && w.word.toLowerCase() !== wordIdOrText.toLowerCase()) return w;\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[status];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      cycleWordStatus: (wordId) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            if (w.id !== wordId) return w;\n            const currentIndex = STATUS_ORDER.indexOf(w.status);\n            const nextStatus = STATUS_ORDER[(currentIndex + 1) % STATUS_ORDER.length];\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[nextStatus];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status: nextStatus };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateConceptStatus: (id, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          concepts: state.concepts.map((c) =>\n            c.id === id ? { ...c, status } : c\n          ),\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      savePhrase: (phrase) => {\n        set((state) => {\n          const key = typeof phrase === 'string' ? phrase : phrase.tp;\n          const already = state.savedPhrases.some(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: today });\n          }\n        }\n      },\n\n      setStudentName: (name) => { set({ studentName: name }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n      setProfileImage: (url) => { set({ profileImage: url }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n\n      updatePhraseNote: (id, notes) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.map(p => {\n            if (typeof p === 'string') return p === id ? { id, tp: p, en: 'User Saved Phrase *', notes } : p;\n            return p.id === id ? { ...p, notes } : p;\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      resetAsNewUser: () => {\n        set({\n          studentName: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      randomizeVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => {\n            const score = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      masterAllVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => ({ ...w, confidenceScore: 92, status: 'mastered' as MasteryStatus }))\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      clearLocalData: () => {\n        set({\n          userId: null,\n          studentName: 'Anthony',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { ...summary, level, rankTitle };\n      },\n\n      setActiveLesson: (curriculumId, moduleId) =>\n        set({ activeCurriculumId: curriculumId, activeModuleId: moduleId }),\n\n      syncToCloud: async (explicitUserId) => {\n        const { vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage, savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate, userId } = get();\n        const targetId = explicitUserId || userId;\n        if (!targetId) return;\n\n        try {\n          await setDoc(doc(db, 'users', targetId), {\n            vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, profileImage,\n            savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate,\n          }, { merge: true });\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n      syncFromCloud: async (uid: string, initialName?: string, initialProfileImage?: string) => {\n        set({ userId: uid });\n        const userDocRef = doc(db, 'users', uid);\n        \n        try {\n          const docSnap = await getDoc(userDocRef);\n          \n          if (!docSnap.exists()) {\n            // New user or no cloud data\n            if (initialName && (get().studentName === 'Anthony' || !get().studentName)) {\n              set({ studentName: initialName });\n            }\n            if (initialProfileImage && !get().profileImage) {\n              set({ profileImage: initialProfileImage });\n            }\n\n            const { vocabulary } = get();\n            const isFresh = vocabulary.every(w => w.status === 'not_started');\n            if (!isFresh) {\n              console.log('Migrating local progress to Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Error checking for migration:', err);\n        }\n\n        return onSnapshot(userDocRef, (snapshot) => {\n          if (!snapshot.exists()) return;\n          const data = snapshot.data();\n\n          const vocabulary = (data.vocabulary || INITIAL_VOCABULARY).map(\n            (w: any) => {\n              const base = INITIAL_VOCABULARY.find(iv => iv.word === w.word);\n              const useCount = typeof w.useCount === 'number' ? w.useCount : 0;\n              const frequencyRank = typeof w.frequencyRank === 'number' ? w.frequencyRank : (base?.frequencyRank ?? 999);\n              \n              if (typeof w.confidenceScore === 'number') return { ...w, useCount, frequencyRank };\n              const status: MasteryStatus = w.status || 'not_started';\n              return { ...w, confidenceScore: STATUS_MIDPOINT[status], useCount, frequencyRank };\n            }\n          );\n\n          set({\n            vocabulary,\n            concepts: data.concepts || initialConcepts,\n            lastUpdated: data.lastUpdated || '',\n            studentName: data.studentName || 'Anthony',\n            profileImage: data.profileImage || '',\n            savedPhrases: data.savedPhrases || [],\n            currentStreak: data.currentStreak || 0,\n            lastActiveDate: data.lastActiveDate || '',\n          });\n        });\n      },\n    }),\n    { \n      name: 'tp-tutor-mastery',\n      partialize: (state) => {\n        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n STATUS_MIDPOINT[nextStatus];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status: nextStatus };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n studentName: string;\n  bio: string;\n  profileImage: string;\n  lastUpdated: string;\n  vocabulary: VocabWord[];\n  concepts: Concept[];\n  curriculums: typeof curriculums;\n  activeCurriculumId: }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: STATUS_ORDER.indexOf(w.status);\n            const nextStatus = STATUS_ORDER[(currentIndex + 1) % STATUS_ORDER.length];\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[nextStatus];\n void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      savePhrase: (phrase) => {\n        set((state) => {\n          const key = typeof phrase === 'string' ? phrase : phrase.tp;\n          const already = state.savedPhrases.some(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === notes } : p;\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { (!isFresh) {\n              console.log('Migrating local progress to Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n w.word);\n              const useCount = typeof w.useCount === 'number' ? w.useCount : 0;\n              const frequencyRank = typeof w.frequencyRank === 'number' ? w.frequencyRank : (base?.frequencyRank ?? 999);\n              \n              if (typeof w.confidenceScore === 'number') return { ...w, useCount, frequencyRank };\n              const status: MasteryStatus = w.status profileImage: data.profileImage || '',\n            savedPhrases: data.savedPhrases || [],\n            currentStreak: data.currentStreak || 0,\n            lastActiveDate: data.lastActiveDate || '../types/mastery';\nimport { initialVocabulary, initialConcepts, curriculums } from '../data/initialMasteryMap';\n\n// ... (existing toFullVocabWord and INITIAL_VOCABULARY)\n\ninterface MasteryActions {\n  applyScoreDeltas: (deltas: { wordId: string; delta: number }[]) => void;\n  updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText: string, status: MasteryStatus) => void;\n  cycleWordStatus: (wordId: string) => void;\n  updateConceptStatus: (id: string, status: MasteryStatus) => void;\n  setLastUpdated: (date: string) => void;\n  savePhrase: (phrase: string | SavedPhrase) => void;\n  recordActivity: () => void;\n  setStudentName: (name: string) => void;\n  updateProfile: (profile: Partial<UserProfile>) => void;\n  addLore: (category: LoreCategory, detail: string) => void;\n  deleteLore: (id: string) => void;\n  setReviewVibe: (vibe: ReviewVibe) => void;\n  setProfileImage: (url: string) => void;\n  updatePhraseNote: void;\n  syncFromCloud: (userId: string, initialName?: string, initialProfileImage?: string) => Promise<Unsubscribe | void>;\n  syncToCloud: (userId?: string) => Promise<void>;\n  getStatusSummary: () => StatusSummary & { xp: number; level: number; rankTitle: string };\n  setActiveLesson: (curriculumId: string, moduleId: string) => void;\n}\n\ninterface MasteryState {\n  userId: string | null;\n  studentName: string;\n  profile: UserProfile;\n  lore: LoreEntry[];\n  reviewVibe: ReviewVibe;\n  profileImage: string;\n  lastUpdated: string;\n  vocabulary: VocabWord[];\n  concepts: Concept[];\n string;\n}\n\ntype MasteryStore = MasteryState & MasteryActions;\n\nconst XP_MAP = { not_started: 0, introduced: 10, practicing: 25, confident: 50, mastered: 100 };\nconst STATUS_ORDER: MasteryStatus[] = ['not_started', 'introduced', 'practicing', 'confident', 'mastered'];\nconst clamp = (n: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));\n\nexport const useMasteryStore = create<MasteryStore>()(\n  persist(\n    (set, get) => ({\n      userId: null,\n      studentName: 'Anthony',\n      profile: { name: 'Anthony', age: '', location: '', sex: '' },\n activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n      applyScoreDeltas: (deltas) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            const d = deltas.find(\n              (delta) =>\n                delta.wordId === w.id ||\n }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      savePhrase: (phrase) => {\n        set((state) => {\n          const key = typeof phrase === 'string' ? phrase : phrase.tp;\n          const already = phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === (existing toFullVocabWord and INITIAL_VOCABULARY)\n\ninterface MasteryActions {\n  applyScoreDeltas: (deltas: { wordId: string; delta: number }[]) => void;\n  updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText: string, status: MasteryStatus) => void;\n  cycleWordStatus: (wordId: string) => void;\n  updateConceptStatus: (id: string, status: MasteryStatus) => void;\n  setLastUpdated: (date: string) => void;\n  savePhrase: (phrase: string | SavedPhrase) => void;\n  recordActivity: () => void;\n  setStudentName: (name: string) => void;\n  updateProfile: (profile: Partial<UserProfile>) => void;\n  addLore: (id: string, notes: string) => void;\n  deletePhrase: (id: string) => void;\n  resetAsNewUser: () => void;\n  randomizeVocab: () => void;\n  masterAllVocab: () => void;\n  clearLocalData: () => => StatusSummary & { xp: number; level: number; rankTitle: string };\n  setActiveLesson: (curriculumId: string, moduleId: string) => void;\n}\n\ninterface MasteryState {\n  userId: string | null;\n  studentName: string;\n  profile: UserProfile;\n  lore: LoreEntry[];\n  reviewVibe: ReviewVibe;\n  profileImage: string;\n  lastUpdated: string;\n  vocabulary: VocabWord[];\n  concepts: Concept[];\n  curriculums: typeof curriculums;\n  activeCurriculumId: string | null;\n  activeModuleId: string | null;\n  savedPhrases: (string | SavedPhrase)[];\n  currentStreak: number;\n  lastActiveDate: string;\n}\n\ntype MasteryStore = MasteryState & MasteryActions;\n\nconst XP_MAP = { not_started: 0, introduced: 10, practicing: 25, confident: 50, mastered: 100 };\nconst STATUS_ORDER: MasteryStatus[] = ['not_started', 'introduced', 'practicing', 'confident', 'mastered'];\nconst clamp = (n: number, min: number, max: number) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, n));\n\nexport const useMasteryStore = create<MasteryStore>()(\n  persist(\n    (set, get) => ({\n      userId: null,\n      studentName: 'Anthony',\n      profile: { name: 'Anthony', age: '', location: '', sex: '' },\n      lore: [],\n      reviewVibe: 'chill',\n      profileImage: '',\n      lastUpdated: '',\n      vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n      concepts: initialConcepts,\n      curriculums,\n      activeCurriculumId: null,\n      activeModuleId: null,\n      savedPhrases: [],\n      currentStreak: 0,\n      lastActiveDate: '',\n\n      applyScoreDeltas: (deltas) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            const d = deltas.find(\n              (delta) =>\n                delta.wordId === w.id ||\n                delta.wordId.toLowerCase() === w.word.toLowerCase()\n            );\n            if (!d) return w;\n            const newScore = clamp((w.confidenceScore ?? 0) + d.delta, 0, 100);\n            return {\n              ...w,\n              confidenceScore: newScore,\n              status: scoreToStatus(newScore),\n              useCount: (w.useCount ?? 0) + 1,\n            };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateVocabStatus: (wordIdOrText, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            if (w.id !== wordIdOrText && w.word.toLowerCase() !== wordIdOrText.toLowerCase()) return w;\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[status];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      cycleWordStatus: (wordId) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map((w) => {\n            if (w.id !== wordId) return w;\n            const currentIndex = STATUS_ORDER.indexOf(w.status);\n            const nextStatus = STATUS_ORDER[(currentIndex + 1) % STATUS_ORDER.length];\n            const targetScore = STATUS_MIDPOINT[nextStatus];\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: targetScore, status: nextStatus };\n          }),\n        }));\n        get().recordActivity();\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      updateConceptStatus: (id, status) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          concepts: state.concepts.map((c) =>\n            c.id === id ? { ...c, status } : c\n          ),\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      savePhrase: (phrase) => {\n        set((state) => {\n          const key = typeof phrase === 'string' ? phrase : phrase.tp;\n          const already = state.savedPhrases.some(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p === key : p.tp === key\n          );\n          if (already) return state;\n          return { savedPhrases: [...state.savedPhrases, phrase] };\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      recordActivity: () => {\n        const today = new Date().toDateString();\n        const lastDate = get().lastActiveDate;\n        if (lastDate !== today) {\n          const yesterday = new Date();\n          yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);\n          if (lastDate === yesterday.toDateString()) {\n            set((state) => ({ currentStreak: state.currentStreak + 1, lastActiveDate: today }));\n          } else {\n            set({ currentStreak: 1, lastActiveDate: today });\n          }\n        }\n      },\n\n      setStudentName: (name) => { set({ studentName: name }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n      setBio: (bio) => { set({ bio }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n      setProfileImage: (url) => { set({ profileImage: url }); void get().syncToCloud(); },\n\n      updatePhraseNote: (id, notes) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.map(p => {\n            if (typeof p === 'string') return p === id ? { id, tp: p, en: 'User Saved Phrase *', notes } : p;\n            return p.id === id ? { ...p, notes } : p;\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      deletePhrase: (id) => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          savedPhrases: state.savedPhrases.filter(p =>\n            typeof p === 'string' ? p !== id : p.id !== id\n          )\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      resetAsNewUser: () => {\n        set({\n          studentName: '',\n          bio: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      randomizeVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => {\n            const score = Math.floor(Math.random() * 101);\n            return { ...w, confidenceScore: score, status: scoreToStatus(score) };\n          })\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      masterAllVocab: () => {\n        set((state) => ({\n          vocabulary: state.vocabulary.map(w => ({ ...w, confidenceScore: 92, status: 'mastered' as MasteryStatus }))\n        }));\n        void get().syncToCloud();\n      },\n\n      clearLocalData: () => {\n        set({\n          userId: null,\n          studentName: 'Anthony',\n          bio: '',\n          profileImage: '',\n          savedPhrases: [],\n          currentStreak: 0,\n          lastActiveDate: '',\n          vocabulary: INITIAL_VOCABULARY,\n          concepts: initialConcepts,\n          activeCurriculumId: null,\n          activeModuleId: null,\n        });\n      },\n\n      setLastUpdated: (date) => set({ lastUpdated: date }),\n\n      getStatusSummary: () => {\n        const { vocabulary } = get();\n        const summary = { not_started: 0, introduced: 0, practicing: 0, confident: 0, mastered: 0, xp: 0 };\n        for (const word of vocabulary) {\n          summary[word.status]++;\n          summary.xp += XP_MAP[word.status];\n        }\n        const level = Math.floor(summary.xp / 500) + 1;\n        let rankTitle = 'nimi lili';\n        if (level >= 5) rankTitle = 'jan pi toki pona';\n        if (level >= 10) rankTitle = 'jan sona';\n        return { ...summary, level, rankTitle };\n      },\n\n      setActiveLesson: (curriculumId, moduleId) =>\n        set({ activeCurriculumId: curriculumId, activeModuleId: moduleId }),\n\n      syncToCloud: async (explicitUserId) => {\n        const { vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, bio, profileImage, savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate, userId } = get();\n        const targetId = explicitUserId || userId;\n        if (!targetId) return;\n\n        try {\n          await setDoc(doc(db, 'users', targetId), {\n            vocabulary, concepts, lastUpdated, studentName, bio, profileImage,\n            savedPhrases, currentStreak, lastActiveDate,\n          }, { merge: true });\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Firebase Sync Error:', err);\n        }\n      },\n\n      syncFromCloud: async (uid: string, initialName?: string, initialProfileImage?: string) => {\n        set({ userId: uid });\n        const userDocRef = doc(db, 'users', uid);\n        \n        try {\n          const docSnap = await getDoc(userDocRef);\n          \n          if (!docSnap.exists()) {\n            // New user or no cloud data\n            if (initialName && (get().studentName === 'Anthony' || !get().studentName)) {\n              set({ studentName: initialName });\n            }\n            if (initialProfileImage && !get().profileImage) {\n              set({ profileImage: initialProfileImage });\n            }\n\n            const { vocabulary } = get();\n            const isFresh = vocabulary.every(w => w.status === 'not_started');\n            if (!isFresh) {\n              console.log('Migrating local progress to Firestore...');\n              await get().syncToCloud(uid);\n            }\n          }\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.error('Error checking for migration:', err);\n        }\n\n        return onSnapshot(userDocRef, (snapshot) => {\n          if (!snapshot.exists()) return;\n          const data = snapshot.data();\n\n          const vocabulary = (data.vocabulary || INITIAL_VOCABULARY).map(\n            (w: any) => {\n              const base = INITIAL_VOCABULARY.find(iv => iv.word === w.word);\n              const useCount = typeof w.useCount === 'number' ? w.useCount : 0;\n              const frequencyRank = typeof w.frequencyRank === 'number' ? w.frequencyRank : (base?.frequencyRank ?? 999);\n              \n              if (typeof w.confidenceScore === 'number') return { ...w, useCount, frequencyRank };\n              const status: MasteryStatus = w.status || 'not_started';\n              return { ...w, confidenceScore: STATUS_MIDPOINT[status], useCount, frequencyRank };\n            }\n          );\n\n          set({\n            vocabulary,\n            concepts: data.concepts || initialConcepts,\n            lastUpdated: data.lastUpdated || '',\n            studentName: data.studentName || 'Anthony',\n            bio: data.bio || '',\n            profileImage: data.profileImage || '',\n            savedPhrases: data.savedPhrases || [],\n            currentStreak: data.currentStreak || 0,\n            lastActiveDate: data.lastActiveDate || '',\n          });\n        });\n      },\n    }),\n    { \n      name: 'tp-tutor-mastery',\n      partialize: (state) => {\n        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n        const { userId, ...rest } = state;\n        return rest;\n      }\n    }\n  )\n);\n","newContent":"/* src/store/masteryStore.ts */\nimport { db } from '../services/firebase';\nimport { create }
